description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of stone and white plaster exterior walls. Large, grid-style windows dominate the facade, allowing for ample natural light and a sense of openness. A prominent balcony with glass railings and potted plants adds a touch of greenery and outdoor living space. The garage door is clad in horizontal gray panels, and the main entryway is recessed beneath the upper floor, providing shelter and a sense of privacy. The rear and side elevations showcase additional large windows and a visible fireplace, emphasizing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is spacious, with multiple rooms and open-plan living areas visible through the windows.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large grid windows, stone and white plaster walls, and a glass-railed balcony with plants.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone-clad garage, recessed entryway, and a mix of large and small windows on the white facade.
description_view_1: The balcony with glass railings and potted plants is prominent, along with a large arched window and multiple grid-style windows.
description_view_2: This side shows a long stretch of white wall with large windows and a visible fireplace inside, emphasizing the open-plan interior.
description_view_3: A wide expanse of grid windows dominates this view, with a central corridor visible through the glass and minimal exterior detailing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows and an arched feature window
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry beneath upper floor, minimalistic door, no porch, and sheltered by the building's overhang
